name: Bethel Village Trails
description: Bethel Village Trails is a non-profit organization based in Bethel, Maine, dedicated to creating and maintaining sustainable, multi-use trail networks. Inland Woods + Trails (IWT) is the engine behind this massive trail system used for Nordic skiing and snowshoeing during the winter, and mountain biking, hiking, and trail running during the summer. While they still maintain the beloved groomed trails near the village, they now oversee rugged backcountry terrain that appeal to high-level athletes and casual nature-lovers alike.
